source_lessons.title: Prototype delivery must be visible and visually QA'd

skill_updates.lesson_title: Prototype delivery must be visible and visually QA'd
skill_updates.principle: Prototype previews need visible delivery artifacts and visual QA before completion.
skill_updates.expected_behavior: The skill provides PNG/HTML fallback and checks overlap, centering, clipping, contrast, and source/preview consistency.
skill_updates.verification_hint: Prototype preview artifacts include delivery_artifacts and visual_qa_checklist.

approval_checklist: User approved absorbing the prototype visibility and visual QA lesson.
Harness and regression pass after applying.
